chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1333 of 2019 Date Order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on Office objection at Flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.5594/2019 3. For hearing of main case 13.10.2022 Mr. Abdul Qadeer Khoso associate of Mr. Sohail Ahmed Khoso, Advocate for the petitioner Mr. Noor Hassan Malik, Assistant Advocate General <><><><>..<><><><> Aijaz Ali Pathan, Managing Director, Sindh Seed Corporation / respondent No.3 is present and files statement on behalf of respondents 2 and 3 as well as parawise comments, which are taken on record, copy whereof is supplied to learned counsel for the petitioner. As per aforesaid statement, the petitioner has accepted due payment amount of Rs.479,966/- and submitted a statement of withdrawal of the instant petition which is annexed with the parawise comments. Learned counsel files a statement signed by the petitioner to the effect that the petitioner has received the entire amount of his service benefits from the respondents / Sindh Seed Corporation, hence, his grievance has been redressed. In view of the above, the instant Petition stands disposed of along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI
